metadata.description: 3-round adversarial brainstorm between Claude and Gemini. One idea in, one converged decision out.

plugins.name: brainstorm
plugins.description: Multi-round brainstorm between Claude and Gemini that turns a single idea into one converged, actionable decision. Use whenever the user wants to brainstorm, ideate, explore strategic options, compare approaches, or think through a decision with multiple viable paths. Also trigger on 'brainstorm', 'let's think through options', 'ideation session', 'explore this idea with Gemini', 'diverge and converge', or when the user wants more than a simple second opinion.
